# Bolivia — MotoPass Flagship Extension

**Official Country Name:** Plurinational State of Bolivia  
**Flag:** 🇧🇴  
**Last Verified:** 2026-07-14  
**Status:** Researching - Flagship (no pure CBI)

## Pathways

| Route | Notes |
|-------|-------|
| **Investor / company** | Business establishment or capital investment — primary RBI route |
| **Solvency / fixed deposit** | Lower-capital budget stacking — verify current decree thresholds |

## Critical Tests

- **Live & work:** Generally yes with valid residency
- **Scope of freedom:** Weaker than Uruguay — limited passport mobility
- **Dual citizenship:** Research required — not a flagship pass

## Land & property

Foreign ownership restricted in border/security zones (INRA). Urban real estate often viable — **legal review required**.

## Bitcoin

Emerging regulation; monitor policy. Not Lightning-ready in JSON until verified.
